analysis:
【今日摘要】
今天市場情緒活躍，受美伊和平協議影響，美元跌至10天來新低，黃金價格上升2%。美國股市未來指數大幅上漲，石油價格跌落。埃隆·馬斯克否認政府支持造就了TSLA和SPCX的成就，特朗普減少電動車補貼讓買家更多地轉向特斯拉。法拉第未來創辦人暨全球CEO YT Jia 週報，內容包括 FF EAI 機器人教育生態系戰略、產品線與新 EAI 裝置發布日期。

【結語】
投資者們應該謹慎地對待市場情緒，避免被市場波動所左右。投資者們應該保持冷靜，評估企業的基本面，選擇合適的投資標的。投資者們也應該注意風險管理，保持投資組合的多元化，避免過度集中於單一股票或市場。

【精選個股】
AAPL - 蘋果公司 - 蘋果公司的業務範圍廣泛，包括手機、電腦、音樂等，基本面良好，值得考慮買進。
TSLA - 特斯拉公司 - 特斯拉公司的電動車業務快速發展，市場份額逐漸增大，基本面良好，值得考慮買進。
SPCX - SpaceX - SpaceX 的太空探索業務快速發展，市場份額逐漸增大，基本面良好，值得考慮買進。
風險提醒：投資市場風險高，投資者應該謹慎地評估風險並保持風險管理。

items.title: Elon Musk Rejects Claims Government Support Built TSLA And SPCX — Says Trump’s EV Credit Cuts Sent More Buyers To Tesla
items.summary: Musk said all government incentives received by his companies amount to less than 2% of the combined value of Tesla and SpaceX.
items.zh_title: 埃隆·馬斯克否認政府支持造就了TSLA和SPCX的成就 —— 說特朗普減少電動車補貼讓買家更多地轉向特斯拉
items.zh_point: 埃隆·馬斯克表示，他的公司所收到的政府補助僅占特斯拉和太空探索技術公司的總值的不到2%。

items.title: Faraday Future Founder and Global CEO YT Jia Shares Weekly Investor Update: Provides New Details on the FF EAI Robotics Education Ecosystem Strategy, Product Line & New EAI Device Launch Happening at Its Los Angeles HQ on June 16
items.summary: LOS ANGELES, June 15, 2026--Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFAI) ("Faraday Future", "FF" or the "Company"), a California-based global Embodied AI (EAI) ecosystem company, today shared a weekly business update from YT Jia, Founder and Global CEO of FF.
items.zh_title: 法拉第未來創辦人暨全球CEO YT Jia 週報：分享 FF EAI 機器人教育生態系戰略、產品線與新 EAI 裝置發布日期
items.zh_point: 法拉第未來創辦人暨全球CEO YT Jia 週報，內容包括 FF EAI 機器人教育生態系戰略、產品線與新 EAI 裝置發布日期，將於6月16日在洛杉磯總部發布。

items.title: Elon Musk Says SpaceX Could Put One Million Tons Of Payload In Orbit Within The Next Five Years
items.summary: SpaceX and Tesla Inc.CEO Elon Musk predicted that the commercial space flight giant could exceed orbital payload timelines and expectations. One Million Tons In Five Years On Tuesday, influencer Sawyer Merritt took to the social media platform X to outline...
items.zh_title: 史匹克公司將在五年內將一百萬噸貨物送入軌道
items.zh_point: 史匹克公司CEO馬斯克預測該公司將超越預期的軌道貨物時間表，公司將在五年內將一百萬噸貨物送入軌道。

items.title: Amazon Graviton5 Chip Aims To Deepen AWS AI Margins And Moat
items.summary: Amazon.com (NasdaqGS:AMZN) has introduced its Graviton5 custom processor for Amazon Web Services (AWS). The chip is now generally available for customers using AWS cloud infrastructure. Graviton5 is aimed at AI and high performance cloud workloads using in house silicon. For investors following Amazon, this move sits at the core of its AWS business, which provides cloud infrastructure and services to a wide range of enterprises and developers. Custom chips like Graviton5 can be important in...
items.zh_title: 亞馬遜Graviton5晶片旨在加深AWS人工智慧利潤和壟斷地位
items.zh_point: 亞馬遜推出Graviton5自訂處理器，為Amazon Web Services (AWS)客戶提供雲端基礎設施。這款晶片針對人工智慧和高性能雲端應用，使用自家研發的晶片。這項動作對於追蹤亞馬遜的投資者而言，關鍵在於其AWS業務，提供雲端基礎設施和服務給各類企業和開發者。自訂晶片如Graviton5對於企業的重要性不容忽視。

items.title: Alphabet Ties Search AI And Mobility Closer To Revenue Potential
items.summary: Google is rolling out a national real estate search feature with HouseCanary, directly surfacing MLS broker listings in mobile search across the U.S. Apple is using Google's Gemini models to power its new Siri AI, while also tapping Google Cloud and Nvidia technology for AI infrastructure. Waymo, Alphabet's autonomous driving unit, has launched its first paid subscription for robotaxi services, moving its ride hailing business toward a membership model. For investors tracking Alphabet...
items.zh_title: Alphabet 將搜尋 AI 和行動性更緊密地接近收入潛力
items.zh_point: Alphabet 正在推出一項全國房地產搜尋功能，與 HouseCanary 合作，直接顯示美國各地的 MLS 中介房屋列表。同時，Alphabet 的子公司 Waymo 也推出其首個付費訂閱服務，讓乘客可以使用無人駕駛汽車接送。這些發展都表明 Alphabet 正在努力將其搜尋 AI 和行動性業務更緊密地接近收入潛力。

items.title: U.S. stock futures jump on Iran deal to end the war; Japan's Nikkei surges 5%: Live updates
items.summary: The three major indexes are coming off a winning week.
items.zh_title: 美股期貨大幅跳升　伊朗和平協議終結戰爭；日本日經指數大漲5%
items.zh_point: 美股期貨大幅跳升，三大股市指數連續一個勝利的周末。

items.title: World leaders welcome U.S.-Iran deal as Europe signals sanctions relief, urges Hormuz reopening
items.summary: The agreement came after more than three months of stop-start negotiations and bouts of fighting since late February, roiling global energy and commodities markets.
items.zh_title: 世界領袖歡迎美伊協議，歐洲表明制裁緩和，促請霍爾木茲海峽重開
items.zh_point: 美伊達成協議，結束逾三個月的磋商和戰事，全球能源和商品市場因此出現波動。

items.title: Markets cheer U.S.-Iran agreement, but some investors caution deal is yet to be signed
items.summary: Asian stocks rallied Monday while oil prices tumbled after the U.S. and Iran agreed to a peace deal aimed at ending nearly four months of conflict.
items.zh_title: 市場歡欣鼓舞 美伊和解協議，但投資人仍需謹慎
items.zh_point: 美國和伊朗達成和解協議，亞洲股市大幅上漲，石油價格也大幅下跌，但仍有投資人表示，協議尚未簽署，投資者需謹慎。

items.title: U.S. and Iran agree on peace deal to end the war, Trump and Pakistan say
items.summary: The deal follows weeks of mixed messaging from both Washington and Tehran on the trajectory of the conflict.
items.zh_title: 美國和伊朗達成和平協議結束戰爭，特朗普和巴基斯坦表態
items.zh_point: 美國和伊朗在多周來的不確定性訊息後，達成和平協議，結束長期的戰爭。特朗普和巴基斯坦也對此表示支持。

items.title: Trump heads to G7 summit in France after reaching deal to end war with Iran
items.summary: The G7 is likely to address the Iran peace deal, as well as Russia's war against Ukraine, which continues to rage in eastern Europe.
items.zh_title: 特朗普前往法國參加G7峰會，與伊朗達成和平協議
items.zh_point: 特朗普與伊朗達成和平協議，將在法國G7峰會上與其他國家領袖討論伊朗和平協議、俄羅斯對烏克蘭的戰爭等議題。

items.title: Stock futures jump, oil prices fall as Trump says U.S. has reached peace deal with Iran
items.summary: Oil prices fell and U.S. stock-index futures jumped Sunday after President Donald Trump said the U.S. has agreed to a peace deal with Iran, apparently ending months of hostilities that shut the Strait of Hormuz and sent the global economy into an oil shock.
items.zh_title: 美國股市未來指數大幅上漲，石油價格跌落，川普稱美伊達成和平協議
items.zh_point: 川普宣布美國與伊朗達成和平協議，石油價格大幅下跌，美國股市未來指數大幅上漲，全球經濟避免了石油價格大幅上漲的風險。

items.title: Will the real Kevin Warsh please stand up? Ahead of his first Fed meeting, economists honestly don’t know what to expect.
items.summary: Perhaps the only thing that can be said with certainty about Kevin Warsh’s press conference following his first meeting as Federal Reserve chair this week is that he will have a captive audience.
items.zh_title: 請出真正的凱文沃許！在他第一次聯邦儲備會議前，經濟學家們實在不知道該期待什麼。
items.zh_point: 凱文沃許即將出任聯邦儲備會議主席，經濟學家們對他的行為和政策方向感到茫然。

items.title: ‘It seems too good to be true’: At a steak-dinner retirement seminar, the guy said annuities can outperform the market. Is that true?
items.summary: “He claimed that fixed-rate annuities are the sparkly, rainbow-fairyland of investments.”
items.zh_title: 這個似乎太好了：在一場牛排晚餐退休研討會上，該男子聲稱年金可以超越市場表現。這是否為真？
items.zh_point: 該男子聲稱固定年金是投資的「神奇之地」，但其真實性值得商榷。

items.title: Defaults in debt markets are starting again, warns Pimco. Here’s the bond giant’s game plan.
items.summary: Investors should increasingly seek out fixed income to anchor portfolios as equity valuations look stretched, says Pimco.
items.zh_title: 高盛警告：債券市場再次出現違約風險，Pimco出招應對
items.zh_point: 投資者應該增加固定收益投資，以穩定投資組合，尤其是在股市估值過高的情況下。

items.title: We thought we found the perfect luxury retirement community, but it’s millions of dollars in debt. Are we trapped?
items.summary: “If we were to leave, we would lose a portion of our buy-in — about $80,000.”
items.zh_title: 我們找到了理想的豪華退休社區，但它欠了數百萬美元，是否陷入困境？
items.zh_point: 一對夫婦在豪華退休社區買入後，卻發現社區欠下數百萬美元的債務，擔心如果離開會損失一部分入金。

items.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
items.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
items.zh_title: 美國股市大幅下跌，受中國DeepSeek事件影響
items.zh_point: 美國股市大幅下跌，納斯達克指數領先跌幅，人工智慧基礎設施製造商股價大幅下跌，Nvidia股價下跌16%。

items.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
items.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
items.zh_title: 紐約金屬交易所金、銀價格下跌
items.zh_point: 紐約金屬交易所的金價和銀價在上市交易後下跌，金價下跌1.4%，連續兩天下跌，銀價下跌2.5%，連續三天下跌。

items.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
items.summary: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.
items.zh_title: 中國DeepSeek AI的關鍵知識
items.zh_point: 中國一家新興公司宣稱已經訓練出高表現的AI模型，且成本低廉，並不需要使用最先進的晶片。

items.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
items.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
items.zh_title: 深度尋找不會淹沒美國AI巨頭
items.zh_point: 深度尋找事件雖然導致Nvidia、Broadcom等科技巨頭股價下跌，但市場恐慌情緒過度膨脹。

items.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
items.summary: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.
items.zh_title: 科技、媒體與電信圈報導：市場話題
items.zh_point: DeepSeek、SoFi 等科技、媒體和電信公司在最新的市場話題中獲得關注。

items.title: While Everyone Was Focused On SpaceX, I'm Buying Gold Miners
items.zh_title: 在所有人都注目於SpaceX時，我正在買黃金礦業股
items.zh_point: 在股市熱鬧的時期，投資者們都在關注SpaceX的發展，但編輯認為黃金礦業股仍是值得關注的投資選擇。

items.title: AMG Boston Common Global Impact Fund Q1 2026 Commentary
items.zh_title: AMG波士頓共同全球影響基金 2026 年第一季度評論
items.zh_point: AMG波士頓共同全球影響基金於2026年第一季度發表評論，內容可能涉及基金績效、投資策略和市場分析等方面。

items.title: DRDGOLD Limited (DRD) Presents at 121 Mining Investment Conference - New York - Slideshow
items.zh_title: DRDGOLD Limited (DRD) 在紐約 121 Mining Investment Conference 上發表演說 - 圖片展示
items.zh_point: DRDGOLD Limited 在紐約 121 Mining Investment Conference 上發表演說，可能與金礦投資相關。

items.title: Woodside Energy: The Potential Exxon Takeover Isn't The Real Opportunity
items.zh_title: 伍德賽德能源：埃克森美孚收購不是真正的機會
items.zh_point: 伍德賽德能源股價近期大幅上升，市場懷疑埃克森美孚可能會收購該公司，但分析師認為這不是伍德賽德能源真正的機會。伍德賽德能源的實際價值可能遠超收購價格，投資者應該關注公司未來的發展潛力。

items.title: Hasbro: Magic Strength Keeps The Buy Case Intact
items.zh_title: 哈斯堡：魔法力量維持買入案
items.zh_point: 哈斯堡的財務實力和市場競爭力仍然堅強，維持買入的投資建議。

items.title: Gold jumps 2% as US-Iran peace deal eases inflation fears, dents dollar
items.zh_title: 黃金跳升2% 美伊和平協議減少通膨恐懼，削弱美元
items.zh_point: 黃金價格因美伊和平協議減少通膨恐懼而上升2%，美元也因此受損。

items.title: Soccer-Scotland’s Tartan Army switches sports for a day in Boston
items.zh_title: 蘇格蘭的紅白軍隊在波士頓轉戰一天
items.zh_point: 蘇格蘭足球隊在波士頓舉行了一個非傳統的活動，讓球迷們在一天內體驗其他運動。

items.title: Dollar hits 10-day low as US, Iran reach peace deal
items.zh_title: 美元跌至10天來新低 美國與伊朗達成和平協議
items.zh_point: 美元在美國與伊朗達成和平協議後，跌至10天來的新低。這可能是因為投資者對美伊和平的樂觀情緒，導致美元的贬值。

items.title: Cathie Wood’s ARK sells AMD stock, buys SpaceX shares
items.zh_title: Cathie Wood的ARK出售AMD股票，購買SpaceX股份
items.zh_point: Cathie Wood的投資公司ARK出售AMD股票，購買SpaceX股份，可能表明對科技領域的投資策略有所調整。

items.title: Motels, marshland and luxury rates: Welcome to the World Cup in New Jersey
items.zh_title: 新澤西州的汽車旅館、沼澤和豪華房價：歡迎來到世界盃
items.zh_point: 新澤西州將成為2026年世界盃足球賽的主辦地，當地的汽車旅館和酒店將迎來大量球迷，同時也會面臨房價上漲和資源供應的挑戰。
